SUBPOENA DUCES TECUM ISSUED TO SUSAN SNIDERMAN

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AMBORT, MARK IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT GLADSTONE INSTITUTE OF VIROLOGY & IMMUNOLOGY UCSF,UNIV. OF CAL.REGENTS,OFFICE OF GEN. COUNCIL UCSF COMMITTEE ON HUMAN RESEARCH NOTHING IN THIS JUDGMENT IS INTENDED TO INTERFERE WITH OR TERMINATE ANY RIGHTS OR REMEDIES PLAINTIFF MAY HAVE FOR REIMBURSEMENT FROM THE RECOVERY FUND ASSOCIATED WITH THE SUBJECT STUDY. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,000.00 FILED BY AMBORT, MARK AS TO DEFENDANT GLADSTONE INSTITUTE OF VIROLOGY & IMMUNOLOGY UCSF,UNIV. OF CAL.REGENTS,OFFICE OF GEN. COUNCIL UCSF COMMITTEE ON HUMAN RESEARCH ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-15-2007 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
